text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day is growing late as Symboli Rudolf and I
head back after our day out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you wouldn't mind, there's somewhere I would
like to drop by before we return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Would you be willing to accompany me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The moon is supposed to be a perfect crescent
tonight, and I hear that the sky will be clear...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf leads me to a shrine located on a
small hill.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There aren't any buildings or bright lights around
here. We should have a perfect view.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perfect is right. A beautiful crescent moon shines
brightly in the sky above us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I rarely speak about this, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, I was often called Luna, on
account of the white streak in my hair.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You could hardly imagine it now, could you? But
it suited me then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I always loved the sound of it, and once I learned
where it came from, I smiled every time I caught
sight of the moon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...But that's in the past now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I left that name behind when I resolved to walk
the path of the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That isn't to say I mourn its loss, you understand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't explain why, but... I simply felt that you
ought to know.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't explain why, but... I simply felt that you
ought to know.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm glad that you were so willing to listen.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I feel... How should I put it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's as if a burden has been lifted from my
shoulders. My heart feels as clear as the night air.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...We ought to head back.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you, Trainer. Tomorrow and
beyond...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the memory she shared still fresh in my
mind, I quietly swear to stay by Symboli Rudolf's
side.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah. Be that as it may, call me that in public and
you'll sound like a lunatic.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Call me Luna, and you'll sound like... Pffft. That's
rather good.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Luna... Lunatic...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's some quality wordplay. Perfect for an
inside joke between comrades.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk back to the academy under the
moonlight, with Symboli Rudolf stifling giggles all
the while.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That... means a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's reassuring to think that, even after I have
walked my path to its end and made my dreams a
reality...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You will still remember who I used to be.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Knowing that, I can forge ahead all the stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf smiles in the moonlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I swear to myself that I will stay by her side, come
what may.
